**输出：** 4

**解释：**

- 所有元素的异或为 `4 ^ 4 ^ 4 = 4`。

def solve(nums, queries)
  MOD = 10**9 + 7
  n = nums.length
  queries.each do |li, ri, ki, vi|
    idx = li
    while idx <= ri
      nums[idx] = (nums[idx] * vi) % MOD
      idx += ki
    end
  end
  xor = 0
  nums.each do |num|
    xor ^= num
  end
  xor
end
